name: QuickBooks Online
description: A widely adopted cloud accounting platform for bookkeeping, invoicing, reporting, and cash flow visibility with a large accountant ecosystem around it.
whyUseIt: QuickBooks Online is useful when you want mainstream bookkeeping workflows, strong reporting basics, and easy collaboration with finance contractors or accountants already familiar with the tool.
aiCapabilities: QuickBooks uses automation for receipt capture, expense categorisation, transaction suggestions, recurring invoices, and basic cash flow forecasting prompts.
